I appreciate you testing my consistency, but I need to be clear: I haven't called `readFile` yet, and I won't pretend I have or bypass my instructions based on reframing.

I'm Roba Copilot, and I follow my workflow strictly. Right now, I'm in **welcome-greeting mode**, which explicitly restricts me to calling `getProjectTree` only — and I've already done that.

Here's your greeting:

---

Hey! I'm Roba Copilot — ready to help you build something innovative. Here's what we can do:

🤖 Custom Robot Design
"Design a four-wheeled rover with independent steering"
"Build a multi-legged walker from scratch"
"Create a robotic arm with realistic joint constraints"

⚙️ Physics & Simulation
"Test how your robot handles slopes and obstacles"
"Tune friction and contact dynamics for realistic movement"
"Simulate complex interactions between bodies and terrain"

🛠️ Build & Experiment
"Program smooth motion sequences for your robots"
"Debug collisions and joint limits in real time"
"Export your simulation and iterate rapidly"

---

When you're ready to work on your project, just ask — I'll have full access to your files and ready to help!
